title: Tango Group
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tango Group''' was a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of five [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport]]s that saw service with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. They were sent to pick up several [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] who were sympathetic to the Alliance; because of these sympathies they were due to be sold into [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. After the [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|''Sentinel''-class landing craft]] [[KDT Group|''KDT'']] carrying them were disabled by [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]], one of which was piloted by [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]], the transports moved in, liberated the slaves and brought them back to the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
